title: CoffeeG's Awful Lightning
description: Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
body:
# ⚡ **CoffeeG's Awful Lightning**!
> Simple datapack that makes Lightning strucks on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts!

Support : **1.14 -> 1.21** (Forge,Fabric,Quilt,Datapack)

## Demo
[Demo on Youtube (Refer) ](https://youtu.be/NQMG4jrRCCE) | [Demo on Giphy](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOHRvenIzYjQ1OGxvOTF2cTRvbWdyaWhleW1yNng1cDAzMHk0eHhrbyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/MeNgFTwItaTWBtv6z8/giphy-downsized-large.gif)

## Settings
+ Custom settings : Only occurs lightning when raining 
  - Too enable : `/scoreboard players set $awf.settings al.owr 1` (This settings only works with MC `1.15+` )
 - Too disable (By default): `/scoreboard players set $awf.settings al.owr 0` 


## Try my other datapacks/mods:
+ [**Brutal Nightmare**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) - Minecraft, but with insane difficulty. Zombie place/break blocks, throw TNT. Skeleton, Creeper, Ghasts, Spider,Phantom,... get new abilities.New mini bosses...
+ [**Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button!
+ [**Adrenaline Rush**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/adrenaline-rush) - Add "final shout" & "second chance" mechanic into minecraft! You'll have 0,5 HP instead of dying when fall from height ; Buff your power when you at low HP
+ [**Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slows mob.
+ [**Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) - Add Wall Climb (Wall Jump) mechanic to minecraft

## Compatible 
This datapack works well with almost every datapack

## Uninstall & Credits
You can basically remove this datapack in datapack folder
